site.name: Smart Tourism Online Platform
footer.aboutDesc: Smart Tourism is a leading online travel service platform in China, providing domestic and international tour booking, visa services, and one-stop travel solutions.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Smart Tourism Online Platform. All rights reserved.
home.hero.title: Explore the World, Start Here
home.hero.subtitle: Professional travel consultants plan your perfect journey
lyzx.title: Travel Consulting
lyzx.desc: Professional travel advisors answering all your travel questions
lyzx.aboutP1: Smart Tourism Online Platform, founded in 2020, is a comprehensive platform specializing in travel information services and online travel booking. We are dedicated to providing users with comprehensive, accurate, and timely travel information, including popular domestic and international attractions, selected tour recommendations, travel guides, and one-stop online booking services.
lyzx.aboutP2: Leveraging advanced information technology and rich travel resources, the platform has established long-term stable partnerships with well-known travel agencies, airlines, and hotel groups both domestically and internationally. Our goal is to 'Make Travel Simple' — enabling every user to enjoy convenient, efficient, and high-quality travel services.
lyzx.adv1Desc: Covering 50+ countries and regions, 1000+ travel routes
lyzx.adv2Desc: Best price guarantee — we'll refund the difference if you find a better deal
lyzx.adv3Desc: One-on-one service from senior travel consultants, customized itineraries
lyzx.adv4Desc: Licensed travel agency, electronic contracts, worry-free after-sales
lyzx.addr: 18F, Smart Tower, No.888 Lujiazui Financial District, Pudong, Shanghai
lyzx.tip1: Check the weather at your destination before traveling
lyzx.tip2: Apply for visas and purchase travel insurance in advance
lyzx.tip3: Carry copies of important documents with you
lyzx.tip4: Respect local laws, regulations, and customs
lyzx.tip5: Pay attention to food hygiene and personal safety

kefu.title: Customer Service
kefu.welcome1: 👋 Hello! Welcome to Smart Tourism. I'm your personal travel assistant, Xiao Zhi.
kefu.welcome2: How can I help you? Click a quick question below or type your question directly.
kefu.messageSuccess: Message sent successfully! We will contact you soon.
kefu.unknown: 🤔 Thank you for your inquiry! You can also call our hotline 400-888-9999 or click a quick question below. Xiao Zhi will help you ASAP 😊
